---
# listing:
#   contents:
#     - "*.qmd"
#   type: grid
#   sort: "date desc"
#   date-format: medium
#   id: exhibition
#   max-description-length: 80
format:
 html:
   toc: false
   theme: michigan.scss
   css: styles.css
---

# Student Art for Policy Change Exhibit 2026

April 21, 1-2:20 PM, The Great Hall, Weill Hall, 735 S State St. 

Please join the students of PubPol 475/750 as they showcase some of the art they created this semester. Ask them about how social science research and theory, [UMMA's American Sampler Exhibit](https://umma.umich.edu/exhibitions/american-sampler-activating-the-archive/), and the [Labadie Collection](https://www.lib.umich.edu/collections/collecting-areas/special-collections/joseph-labadie-collection) informed their art.

![](https://www.ramsa.com/sites/default/files/A02002-ESTO-2006A87.463.jpg "A photo of Weill Hall's Great Hall")



::: {layout="[[1,1,1]]"}


:::
